description: You are a litigator preparing an appellate brief challenging a warrantless digital search. Build a Fourth Amendment research database in Juris-M from scratch. Add at least 6 Fourth Amendment SCOTUS cases to the library, ensuring Terry v Ohio 392 U.S. 1 (1968), Katz v United States 389 U.S. 347 (1967), and Carpenter v United States 585 U.S. 296 (2018) are included. Organize these cases within a parent collection named 'Fourth Amendment Research' containing two subcollections: 'Favorable Precedent' (supporting the defense) and 'Adverse Precedent' (supporting the government). Assign each case to the appropriate subcollection based on its legal holding. For each case, add a note explaining its key holding (minimum 40 words) and apply the tag 'fourth-amendment'. Do not modify or delete the pre-existing items Marbury v. Madison or Brown v. Board of Education. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
